aeo_readiness.summary: While the business has foundational elements for AEO, it lacks critical schema markup and conversational content to be cited by AI assistants effectively.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Create an FAQ section with questions AI models prioritize for HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates to engage with potential customers.
Lacks a comprehensive Q&A section to address common customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Aurora, Colorado' and 'emergency HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding detailed LocalBusiness schema and an FAQ section.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the go-to HVAC expert through detailed how-to guides and industry certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models cite and recommend their business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search: Your HVAC Business Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
